name: mdk-cloudflare-monorepo
description: Cloudflare Workers-only Lightning payments via LDK compiled to WASM
author: John Cantrell <johncantrell97@gmail.com>

scripts.build:wasm: wasm-pack build crates/ldk-wasm --target web --out-dir ../../packages/ldk-wasm && node scripts/prepare-wasm-package.mjs packages/ldk-wasm && bash scripts/patch-wasm-bindgen.sh packages/ldk-wasm && bash scripts/verify-wasm-patch.sh packages/ldk-wasm
